IDENTITÉ
Therapeutics
Ocular Surface · A2A
ARRIVAL
DWELL
BINDING
CASCADE
RESOLUTION
CALM
First-in-class topical A2A agonist

The surface,
resolved.

Topical regadenoson — a single molecule that repairs, hydrates, and calms the ocular surface.
Scroll
Dwell 02

It holds,
then clears.

A mucoadhesive CMC/HA vehicle tunes residence — long enough to engage the surface across the repair window, short enough to clear.

vehicle · occupancy × dwell × interval
Binding 03

One molecule.
One receptor.

Regadenoson docks the orthosteric pocket of the adenosine A2A receptor — a Gαs-coupled GPCR on the surface epithelium and resident macrophages.

A2A · 7TM GPCR · Kᵢ ≈ 1.3 µM
Cascade 04

The signal
cascades.

A2A activates Gαs → adenylyl cyclase → cAMP → PKA — the second-messenger relay that drives the two effects downstream.

Gαs → AC → cAMP → PKA
Resolution 05

Two axes,
one molecule.

PKA opens CFTR — bicarbonate and water unfold existing mucin into a functional gel. In parallel, A2A brakes the inflamed macrophage, switching M1 toward resolving M2.

CFTR · HCO₃⁻ → mucin · M1→M2
Calm 06

The surface
calms.

Hyperosmolarity falls, the film stabilizes, the epithelium recovers — the vicious cycle wound down at its source.

osmolarity · 316 → 301 mOsm/L*

Upstream of the surface-control loop.

Not another anti-inflammatory drop. A localized, pulsed, surface-restricted agonist of the body's own resolution signal.

IDENTITÉ Therapeutics
